rulings.Case Title: BARRY JAEGER VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS(B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, October 9, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT ROCKWELL AUTOMATION, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion denied, failure to shift burden of proof. Defendant fails to show that defendant's products that plaintiff worked on did not contain asbestos. Defendant does not specifically reference the discovery reponses that are factually devoid and only references them generally. Notice of motion and format of separate statement do not comply with CRC 3.1350(b) and 3.1350(h). =(302/CWW)
